title: Diagnostic Measurement: Theory, Methods, and Applications
text:
Preface
This is the companion website for Diagnostic Measurement: Theory, Methods, and Applications (Rupp, Templin, & Henson, 2010), published by Guilford Press.
The site collects supplemental materials for the book — example data, code, errata, and references to follow-up methodological work that has appeared since publication.

title: Diagnostic Measurement: Theory, Methods, and Applications
text:
How to use this site
Each chapter of the book has a corresponding page here. Where applicable, you will find:

A short summary of the chapter
Example datasets used in the chapter
Reproducible R code (and Mplus / OpenBUGS where relevant) for the analyses presented
Errata and clarifications

title: Diagnostic Measurement: Theory, Methods, and Applications
text:
Citing the book
If you use materials from the book or this site in your work, please cite:

Rupp, A. A., Templin, J., & Henson, R. A. (2010). Diagnostic measurement: Theory, methods, and applications. New York, NY: Guilford Press.
